activities_projects.title: Population Density Map Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze spatial variation of population density
steps: Mark states with density above 500 persons per sq km
Mark states with density below 250 persons per sq km
Write reasons for the variation

activities_projects.title: Population Growth Data Interpretation
steps: Use census data from 1951–2011
Plot population growth rate graph
Write three observations from the graph

activities_projects.title: Push-Pull Migration Case Study
steps: Identify a nearby city with migrant population
Write push factors from rural areas
Write pull factors attracting people to cities

activities_projects.title: Population and Resource Debate
activities_projects.objective: Understand the relationship between population and resources
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports large population as resource
Another group argues population pressure on resources

activities_projects.title: Urbanization Study Project
steps: Find two million-plus cities in India
Study their population growth
Write reasons for rapid urbanization

activities_projects.title: Population Structure Analysis
steps: Define age structure
Explain dependent and working population
Write importance of balanced age structure

activities_projects.title: Adolescent Health Awareness Campaign
steps: Prepare posters about adolescent nutrition
Include problems like anemia
Present the poster to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand health issues among adolescents

activities_projects.title: National Population Policy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Study policy measures for population control
steps: Write the objectives of NPP 2000
Explain how education helps population control
Suggest one additional policy measure

activities_projects.title: Population and Development Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand relationship between population and development
steps: Write three advantages of healthy population
Explain how population affects economic development
Give examples

activities_projects.title: Mini Census Project
activities_projects.objective: Understand how census data is collected
steps: Prepare five questions about family size and education
Collect data from five households
Prepare a simple report based on the collected data
